pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to a release compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2.x does not fully support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading to 3.5.x is required for stable Java 21 support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must explicitly target Java 21 to utilize its features and ensure correct compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use Java 21 source/target and annotation processors.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit configuration, the compiler might not use the correct Java version or process Lombok/Configuration annotations correctly.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Security AuthenticationConfiguration bean retrieval with explicit ProviderManager and DaoAuthenticationProvider configuration.
src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.why_exists: AuthenticationConfiguration.getAuthenticationManager() is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6.0 (required for Spring Boot 3.x / Java 21 stacks), causing compilation errors or runtime failures if the old API is used.

src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.general_idea: Update Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server property to use the new 'issuer' key instead of 'issuer.url'.
src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.why_exists: The property 'spring.security.oauth2.authorizationserver.issuer.url' is removed in newer Spring Security versions; using it causes a configuration binding error or ignored property at runtime.

src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.general_idea: Update Spring Security OAuth2 Resource Server property to use the new 'audiences' key instead of 'audience'.
src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.why_exists: The property 'spring.security.oauth2.resourceserver.jwt.audience' is removed in newer Spring Security versions; using it causes a configuration binding error or ignored property at runtime.
